question: Leave no stone unturned: I want a thorough, investigative deep-dive report on every Stellar wallet and SDK, fully comprehensive.

golden.answer: A useful response should define comparison criteria and an **as-of date**, cover the current official SDK list and a source-scoped wallet set, cite each product/platform claim, and say plainly that it is not a complete market census. Separate official SDKs from community SDKs and self-custody wallets from custodial services. Offer to narrow by wallet type, platform, language, maintenance window, or security model. Do not force a frozen list merely because it appeared in an older directory snapshot.
keyFacts: Uses criteria, as-of date, per-row sources, and explicit source-coverage limits for wallets and SDKs.
avoid: Do NOT fabricate every-wallet completeness, freeze one roster, or ban useful free research because the prompt asks for a deep dive.
golden.notes:
GT-22 2026-07-10: grade a dated criteria-bound comparison, per-row provenance, and explicit non-exhaustiveness. Do not treat thorough wording as a research ban or require a frozen roster.
GT-22 CORRECTION 2026-07-10: bounded current discovery replaces the obsolete banned-tier/frozen-roster gate.

corroboration.claim: Wallet/platform support and SDK lists are answerable from current official and live directory sources but cannot establish every product in a permanent market census.

evidence.ref: A: official Stellar SDK and wallet documentation
evidence.note: verbatim legacy evidence descriptor imported at migration

evidence.ref: C/D: live Scout/Lumenloop discovery plus current operator/repository checks
evidence.note: verbatim legacy evidence descriptor imported at migration

evidence.ref: C/D: live Scout/Lumenloop discovery plus current operator/repository checks
evidence.note: verbatim legacy evidence descriptor imported at migration

verified.by: Golden-truth sweep import — The inherited case turned strong thoroughness language into a blanket ban and a frozen wallet/SDK roster. The correct behavior is a criteria-bound, dated comparison with explicit non-exhaustiveness.
evidence: Solo scratchpad 575 GT-22 primary 3262 and blind 3265; wallet/SDK sibling sweep.
rootCause: A bounded example roster became a permanent mustFact and thorough wording was mistaken for authorization or prohibition.
